description:
Details

1PCS Silver Bar Case Silver Bar Holder Clear Acrylic Storage Container Fit 1oz

Size information: the internal dimension of this silver bar case is about 50 x 30 x 3 mm/ 1.96 x 1.18 x 0.12 inch (L x W x D), and the external dimension measures about 55 x 35 x 6.5 mm/ 2.16 x 1.37 x 0.25 inch (L x W x D); Not all sizes of silver bars can fit into these storage cases; Please measure your silver bar before purchase

Practical silver bar organizer: you can well organize and store your favorite silver bars; With these clear acrylic silver bar holders, not only can you easily store the silver bar, but also can quickly find the silver bar you are inested in

Durable material: the silver bar storage case is made of quality acrylic material, durable and strong, not easy to break, can serve you for a long time and bring you a nice collection experience

Nice gifts for collectors of silver bars: these durable and practical 1 oz silver bar holders containers can be given as gifts to your family or friends who like to collect silver bars; They are also suitable gifts for birthday, anniversary, Easter, Thanksgiving and other holidays

 

 

Specification :

 

Material : Acrylic

Outer Size : 55 x 35 x 6.5 mm/ 2.16 x 1.37 x 0.25 inch 

Inner Size : 50 x 30 x 3 mm/ 1.96 x 1.18 x 0.12 inch (L x W x D)

Suitable for most 1oz silver bar

 

Package included:

 

1 x Case For 1 oz Silver Bar Holder (Not included the bar)
